title: New website launched
text: The Bugfish site has been rebuilt from scratch: new grey/orange design, real sub-pages, JSON-driven content and everything hosted locally on GitHub Pages.

title: Projects section is now JSON-based
text: Every project category (Docker, Android, Framework, JavaScript, Suitefish, Games, Windows, Websoftware) can now be edited through a single JSON file in data/projects/.

title: Three tracks in the player
text: Mortis, Fear and Transcend are available in the on-site music player — served locally, no streaming service involved.
